sourceYapk: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Vendor Onboarding & Compliance Management v4.1 Dashboard-4.5 - add a reference dashboard.yapk
missingExistingIdsReason: The reference-only sample dashboard page from the v4.5 study package was intentionally removed; retained Vendor dashboard, child list, field, and list-view IDs remain preserved.
dynamicControlsRule: Dynamic controls are only generated inside the Kanban item template.
pageStructureRule: Both generated dashboards use page attrs.container.padding [null,{top/right/bottom/left:'--sp--s0'}], page neutral background, top-level Main container, nested Content container, and all visible sections inside Content.
gridCaptionRule: Generated flex_grid controls set displayLabel to [null,false] and omit nv_label so the Grid display caption stays off.
